calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-28-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Barbara Anscher; Clerk: JIRoque; Not Reported. (Dept. 218).

Appearances:
Attorney, John Zanghi, representing and appearing on behalf of the plaintiff.

Defendant, Ibania Quijano, is present.
Attorney, Erin Dougherty, representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 300 Santa Rosa Avenue #1, San Francisco, CA.

This case settled, the trial date of NOV-02-2009 is vacated.
